sentences.translation: Nastavnica je govorila o važnosti zdravlja.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher talked about the importance of health.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ إِنَّ غَسْلَ الأَيْدِي يَمْنَعُ الأَمْرَاضَ.
sentences.translation: Rekla je da pranje ruku sprečava bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: She said that washing hands prevents diseases.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَتْ مِنَ الطُّلَّابِ أَنْ يَغْسِلُوا أَيْدِيَهُمْ قَبْلَ الأَكْلِ.
sentences.translation: Zamolila je učenike da peru ruke prije jela.
sentences.translationEn: She asked the students to wash their hands before eating.

sentences.arabic: وَعَدَ الطُّلَّابُ بِأَنْ يَتَّبِعُوا هَذِهِ العَادَةَ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su obećali da će slijediti ovu naviku.
sentences.translationEn: The students promised to follow this habit.

sentences.translation: Nastavnica je bila sretna zbog njihovog interesovanja.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher was happy with their interest.
